name: Spectur Limited
summary: Spectur Limited designs, develops, manufactures, and sells remote solar sensing, thinking, and acting platforms, and related products and services in Australia. The company offers 3G/4G solar security, time-lapse, and thermal security camera systems; and camera emergency warning systems, including shark warning system that bridges the crucial time gap between a shark sighting and authorities alerting beach users. It also provides portable hard stand base; and security camera rapid deployment trailer for mobile and temporary applications. In addition, the company offers security cameras for hire. Its products are used in construction and building, government, warehouse and logistics, farming and agriculture, and utility sectors, as well as remote sites. Spectur Limited was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Welshpool, Australia.
